name: Knee Case Simulator
description: Oops, Tiara fell and hurt her knee! Dont worry, youre here to save the day! Jump in as a doctor and fix her up with some quick knee surgery. Follow the right steps to ensure shes back on her feet in no time. Once shes healed, its time for some fun! Check out some cute outfits and accessories in our collection and give her a fresh, stunning look!
instructions: Use MOUSE to play the game
